titleStmt.title: SII 22.271: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 271. (A.R. No. 271 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—46th YEAR (A.D. 1115-16)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc. It records an endowment of 60 kāśu made by Madhurāntakaṉ Ponnambalakkūttar alias Kāliṅgarājar the headman of Arumbākkam residing at Maṇavil in Maṇavil-nāḍu a subdivision of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam for burning 10 perpetual lamps in the temple at Tirumālpēru in Valla-nāḍu a division of Dāmaṟkōṭṭam in Jayangoṇḍaśōḻa maṇḍalam. The Nagarattār of Pandi alias Lōkamādēvipuram in the same kōṭṭam who received the amount, agreed to measure out as interest thereon, 75 nāḻi of oil every month to the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple. The record is attested at the end by 19 signatories including the Nagarakkaṇakku.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu virumpa nilamaka ṇilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi
cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimannava ririyaluṟṟaḻitarat tikkaṇaittuntan cakkaranaṭātti
vijayābhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṅhāsanattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum
viṟṟirun=taruḷiya korājakesarivarmarāna cakravattikaḷ
śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 6Āvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tā
marnāṭṭup pan=tiyāna Ulokamātevipurattu nakarattom
ikkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭut tirumāṟpeṟṟu Uṭaiyār
tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyāṟku maṇaviṟkoṭṭattu maṇavil nāṭṭu
maṇavi larumpākkiḻār maturāntakan ponnampalakkūttarāna kāliṅkarājar
vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakku 10 viḷakkoṉṟuk kāṟukācāka viḷakkup pattukku
pan=tiyāna Ulokamātevipurattu nakarattoṅ kaikkoṇṭa kācu 6 10 kācon
ṟukkut tiṅkaḷ Aivuḻakkeṇṇai pāṭṭakkāloṭokkum nāḻiyāṟ palicai
polivatākavum Ikkācaṟupatukkun tiṅkaḷeḻupattaiññāḻi Eṇṇai Aḷakkakkaṭa
vomākavum Ikkoyilil śivabrāhmaṇar pakkale Aḷantu taravukoḷḷak kaṭavomā
kki Ittirunan=tā viḷakkup pattuñ can=tirātittavarai celuttakkaṭavo mānom
Innakaran=tavarilum Eṟina nakarattiruntum Ivveṇṇai Iṟukkakkaṭavo mānom Ulokamātevipurattu nakarat
tom Ippaṭikku nakarakkaṇakku kovalan veṇṇaikkūttanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṭavuḻān moṭi
tirumākāḷamuṭaiyāne nivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuc cātta
ntai cantirātitta namputāḻiyen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cātta kumā
ran ciruṭaiyānetiyen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Eṭṭi teva
kaṇatanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku viṟpeṭukiḻān Āṭavalān
cempiyanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kuḻattuḻān Āraṇi Ārūra neḻuttu Ip
paṭikku Āmuḻānceri vaṭukan Oppānamaikku maṅkalaṅkiḻān kaṇṭi Eṭṭi yeṉ
Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Eccan tiruvaraṅkanum kuḷattuḻān can=ti puṟṟiṭaṅ
koṇṭānum koṟṟan tiṇṭiyum Oppātamaikku Ivai kūttan veṇṇai
kkūtta neḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṇavāṇiyan Āticcaṉ celvan Oppāna maikku maṇi
ya nakilane nivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Oruppanaiyan vaḷḷicane nivai En Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkup pantaitevan kāṭāṭi Oppānamaikku peruṅkāṭan tiruvaraṅka nen I
vai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kūḷakkuṭaiyān cūṟai Akattiyane nivai En Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikkup paiyyaṉ tirumākāḷam peruṅkāṭane nivai En Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kaṇavati tāḻiyen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tāḻaippuṟampi
yan Aruḷāḷanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kumārantai can=ti periyāne
n Ivai En Eḻuttu ..itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
